TutorialWelcomeStep1.title: Welcome to the tutorial
TutorialWelcomeStep1.description:
Welcome to your first day in the Slog!

This tutorial will give you some basic training on how to operate your crew and start building your ship.

You can move this tutorial menu at any time by [color=LIGHT_GREEN]clicking and dragging[/color] inside the [color=PURPLE]top bar[/color] using the {select}.

FinishStep1.title: Tutorial complete
FinishStep1.description:
You have completed the tutorial!

There is still a lot to learn but don't get discouraged, it may take several attempts before you master all the mechanics.

If you need additional help, you can always refer to the [color=PURPLE]Operations Handbook[/color] by clicking the highlighted [color=PURPLE]Information[/color] button and navigating to the [color=PURPLE]Operations Handbook[/color] tab.

[i]Also note, this tutorial will continue to expand and be refined over time[/i].
